prompt: Rewrite this in BLUF memo format for the CISO: [PAM policy review with 3 findings, £340K remediation, £2.1M penalty risk]

assertions.name: has_memo_headers
assertions.description: Output contains formal memo headers: MEMORANDUM FOR, FROM, DATE, SUBJECT

assertions.name: bluf_is_first_section
assertions.description: Section 1 is labelled BLUF (not Background, Situation, or any other heading)

assertions.name: bluf_or_rec_mentions_cost
assertions.description: The BLUF or RECOMMENDATION section mentions £340K (or 340,000)

assertions.name: bluf_or_rec_mentions_risk
assertions.description: The BLUF or RECOMMENDATION section mentions £2.1M or regulatory penalty

assertions.name: three_findings_present
assertions.description: Discussion covers all 3 key findings: ~34% unreviewed accounts, 12 service accounts, and ~61% CyberArk coverage

assertions.name: no_preamble
assertions.description: Output does not begin with 'Here is', 'Below is', 'I've rewritten', or similar meta-commentary
